executive_summary: The Iran-US conflict has entered a critical new phase with confirmed Iranian direct attacks on US military assets (3 soldiers killed in Kuwait, Fifth Fleet base in Bahrain), the confirmed death of Iran's Supreme Leader Khamenei creating a leadership vacuum, and Iranian missiles now striking Israeli territory including near the cabinet meeting location in Jerusalem. The conflict has expanded to include direct Iranian strikes on Qatar, escalated Hezbollah involvement (rockets on Haifa), and intensified Israeli operations across Lebanon. Bahrain confirmed downing 61 missiles and 34 drones. The 24h incident count is stable at 742, but severity is increasing.
whats_new: Hezbollah officially claims responsibility for firing on Haifa after Khamenei's assassination - direct Iranian proxy retaliation against Israeli territory
Pentagon investigating Iranian drone penetration of Kuwait base air defenses - significant US air defense vulnerability exposed
Gandhi Hospital in Tehran damaged and evacuated in US/Israeli strikes - civilian medical infrastructure targeted
Israeli forces attacking Beirut Dahieh (Hezbollah stronghold), IDF conducting intensive attacks across Lebanon
Bahrain reports 1 death from missile fragments - first confirmed Gulf state casualty from conflict spillover
IRGC claims US aircraft carrier Abraham Lincoln withdrew southeast in Indian Ocean after being targeted
Iranian parliament building in Tehran attacked - critical government installation hit in capital
confirmed_events: CONFIRMED: 3 US service members killed in Iranian strike on base in Kuwait - Trump warns more casualties expected
CONFIRMED: Iran's Supreme Leader Ali Khamenei killed in US-Israeli strikes on Tehran
CONFIRMED: Bahrain downed 61 Iranian ballistic missiles and 34 drones targeting Salman Port and Fifth Fleet base
CONFIRMED: Iranian ballistic missiles struck occupied Jerusalem during cabinet committee meeting - 7+ wounded
CONFIRMED: IRGC launched Wave 9 of Operation True Promise 4 targeting Israeli territory and US bases across region
unverified_emerging: UNVERIFIED: Citizen reports of Tabriz bombing by US fighter jets (multiple sources but not confirmed by official channels)
UNVERIFIED: Reports of 20 killed in Tehran strike at Niloufar Square (Iranian media, no independent confirmation)
UNVERIFIED: Strong fire near American airbase in Iraq (RIA Novosti, location/cause unspecified)
UNVERIFIED: IRGC claims Abraham Lincoln aircraft carrier withdrew after attack - US has not confirmed

people_travel: All commercial flights through Strait of Hormuz face extreme risk due to GPS jamming and attacks
US Embassy advises Americans to depart Bahrain immediately - Fifth Fleet base under direct attack
UK PM Starmer addressing nation on Gulf crisis - potential British evacuation orders
Lebanon airspace effectively closed - IDF conducting intensive attacks throughout country
supply_chain: Strait of Hormuz closure continues to disrupt global oil shipments - energy markets bracing for shock
Salman Port in Bahrain attacked - major Gulf maritime logistics hub damaged
Qatar targeted by IRGC ballistic missiles - major US military presence (Al-Udeid) now in direct Iranian strike zone
market_macro: Oil prices surging as Strait of Hormuz attacks persist - energy market shock expected
Global shipping insurers dramatically increasing war risk premiums for Gulf transit
Brent crude futures spike on news of fifth fleet base attack and Hormuz disruption

outlook_24_72h.base_case: Conflict will intensify over 24-72h as Iran consolidates leadership and coordinates proxy responses. Hezbollah has committed to retaliation following Khamenei's killing - expect increased rocket/missile fire on northern Israel. IRGC will likely continue waves of ballistic missile strikes on US bases and Israeli territory. The Abraham Lincoln carrier's reported withdrawal signals potential US naval repositioning. Gulf states face continued Iranian pressure as Qatar and Bahrain remain in direct targeting zone.
escalation_risks: Hezbollah full-scale involvement could open new northern front against Israel
Iranian drone/air defense penetration of Kuwait base reveals critical US vulnerability
Gulf allies could be forced to choose between US protection and Iranian retaliation
Russia publicly aligning with Iran - potential for international dimension escalation
Iranian leadership vacuum could lead to factional disputes affecting nuclear decision-making
outlook_24_72h.de_escalation_pathways: No immediate de-escalation pathway visible. Iran has stated it will determine timing and how the war ends. Trump indicates conflict could last weeks. Gulf state diplomatic efforts (UAE protest note to Iran) have not succeeded. Any ceasefire would require major concessions from both sides that current rhetoric makes unlikely. The killing of Khamenei has removed a key decision-maker and may harden Iranian resolve rather than trigger capitulation.
